display.purpose: Landing page hero headline only. Max once per page, max 4.5rem.

headline.purpose: Section headings (H2). Used on both landing and app surfaces.

title.purpose: Card titles, modal titles, panel headers.

body.purpose: Body copy, descriptions, chat messages. 65-75ch max line length.

label.purpose: Button labels, tags, nav items, metadata.

mono.purpose: Code blocks, filenames, technical identifiers only. Never UI labels.

shadows.name: ambient-xs
shadows.purpose: Card default resting state. Barely visible, no decorative shadow.

shadows.name: ambient-sm
shadows.purpose: Card hover state. Subtle lift feedback.

shadows.name: elevated
shadows.purpose: Dropdown menus. Ensures readability over complex layouts.

shadows.name: overlay
shadows.purpose: Modal dialogs. Maximum separation from page content.

motion.name: ease-out-fast
motion.purpose: Micro-interactions: hover color shifts, icon state changes. ~120ms.

motion.name: ease-out-standard
motion.purpose: Default state transitions: button press, card hover lift. ~200ms.

motion.name: press-scale
motion.purpose: Button active press feedback. Instant on :active, no transition needed.

components.name: Primary Button (App)
components.description: Main action button in the studio workspace. Solid ink/paper background with inverted text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.92); color: #0a0a0c; padding: 8px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 200ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .ds-btn-primary:active:not(:disabled) { transform: scale(0.95); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.35); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Primary Button (App) — Light
components.description: Light theme variant of the primary app button.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary-light { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.88); color: #ffffff; padding: 8px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 200ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1); } .ds-btn-primary-light:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .ds-btn-primary-light:active:not(:disabled) { transform: scale(0.95); } .ds-btn-primary-light:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; } .ds-btn-primary-light:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.35); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary or subtle action. Transparent background, visible on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: transparent; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); padding: 8px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms, color 120ms; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.92); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.35); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Landing CTA Button
components.description: Primary CTA button on the marketing landing page. Solid indigo, no gradient, no glow shadow.
components.css: .ds-btn-landing { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #6366f1; color: #ffffff; padding: 14px 40px; border: none; border-radius: 16px; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1); } .ds-btn-landing:hover { background: #818cf8; } .ds-btn-landing:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-landing:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #6366f1; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Landing Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary CTA on landing. Subtle border, no fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-landing-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: transparent; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.92); padding: 14px 32px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 16px; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms, border-color 200ms; } .ds-btn-landing-secondary:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.18); } .ds-btn-landing-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.35); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Standard form input. Subtle background, border-shift on focus.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.92); padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 12px; font-size: 14px; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; outline: none; transition: border-color 200ms; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.92); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.22); }

components.name: Chat Input
components.description: Chat message input with ring focus treatment.
components.css: .ds-input-chat { flex: 1; background: transparent; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.92); padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border-radius: 12px; font-size: 14px; outline: none; transition: border-color 200ms; } .ds-input-chat:focus { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.12); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(255,255,255,0.12); } .ds-input-chat::placeholder { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.22); }

components.name: Project Card
components.description: Project listing card. Subtle border, shadow lift on hover.
components.html:
Project Title
2 hours ago · 12 chapters
components.css: .ds-card { background: #111114; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.92); padding: 20px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.04); cursor: pointer; transition: box-shadow 200ms, border-color 200ms; } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.14); } .ds-card-title { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.92); margin-bottom: 4px; } .ds-card-meta { font-size: 12px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35); }

components.name: Nav Item
components.description: Sidebar navigation item with active indicator.
components.html:
Projects
Studio
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 12px; font-size: 14px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms, color 120ms; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.92); } .ds-nav-item--active { background: rgba(99,102,241,0.15); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.92); font-weight: 500; } .ds-nav-icon { width: 16px; height: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-nav-indicator { margin-left: auto; width: 4px; height: 16px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #818cf8; }

components.name: Badge
components.description: Accent badge for status, count, or category.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; background: rgba(99,102,241,0.15); color: #818cf8; }

narrative.overview: Web Video Studio 的设计语言像一间白描画室——没有多余的颜色，没有装饰性的炫技。黑白灰的精确层级构筑空间，排版承载信息节奏，颜色只在传递功能信号时出现。每一像素都有存在的理由。这不是「极简主义」作为风格标签，而是作为工作伦理：工具隐退，让创作者的内容占据视觉焦点。系统明确拒绝 AI 生成式设计的通病：没有渐变文字、没有紫蓝光晕、没有毛玻璃卡片、没有Inter字体、没有嵌套卡片。
keyCharacteristics: 单色基底 + 单一纯色强调（indigo），无渐变
衬线标题 + 系统无衬线正文，用排版建立信息层级
暗色/亮色双主题，暗色为默认
5 级文字透明度阶梯，精确控制信息密度
极平的表面层级——阴影仅用于模态框和悬停反馈
12px 主圆角，16px 营销卡片圆角

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: 系统只有一个强调色：solid indigo（#6366f1）。占比不超过任何屏幕的 5%。它的稀有就是它的力量。

rules.name: The Zero Gradient Rule
rules.body: 系统禁用 CSS gradient。按钮、背景、文字、阴影——全部纯色。这是与「AI 味」切割的最强制约。

rules.name: The No Glow Rule
rules.body: 禁用 box-shadow 带颜色扩散。阴影只能是中性黑/白。

rules.name: The Four-and-a-Half Rule
rules.body: t1 到 muted 之间有 4 层有意义的信息层级 + 1 层几乎消失的底噪。不要跳过层级。

rules.name: The Two-Font Rule
rules.body: 每个页面最多两种字体（衬线标题 + 无衬线正文）。不在同一页面混用两种无衬线或两种衬线。

rules.name: The Display Floor
rules.body: 标题 letter-spacing 不低于 -0.04em。超过这个值字母粘连，读起来局促。

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: 表面在静止状态下是平的。阴影仅作为悬停或浮层状态的响应出现。永远不用阴影做装饰。

dos: 使用 5 级文字透明度阶梯（t1→muted）建立信息层级。每一级有明确的语义角色。
使用 12px 作为应用内组件的主圆角，16px 用于落地页卡片。保持一致性。
用表面背景色区分层级，而非阴影。
保持唯一的强调色 indigo 占比低于任何屏幕的 5%。
使用 text-wrap: balance 在 h1-h3 上，text-wrap: pretty 在长文本上。
每个动画提供 prefers-reduced-motion 降级方案。
落地页标题使用 Source Serif，正文使用系统无衬线。
donts: 使用 CSS gradient。任何地方。
使用 background-clip: text 渐变文字。
使用带颜色的 box-shadow glow。
灰色文字放在有色背景上。
使用大于 16px 的卡片圆角。
使用 border-left 大于 1px 的彩色侧边条。
在每段上方放全大写小字 eyebrow。
用数字编号装饰每个区域标题。
